title: Blechnum dives
taxonomy: Blechnum dives is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is a type of deciduous fern native to New Zealand. Blechnum dives is classified within the genus Blechnum, which includes approximately 50 species of ferns. The family Blechnaceae is part of the larger division Polypodiales, which comprises a wide variety of ferns. Blechnum dives is a distinctive species with unique characteristics, making it an interesting subject for botanical study.
